name: Cappuccino Cupcakes
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup instant espresso powder, dissolved in 1/2 cup water
1 1/2 cups frozen whipped topping (thawed), unsweetened cocoa powder for dusting
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly coat 18 standard-size muffin pan cups with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Whisk together flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt in a small bowl.
4. Stir together prune puree, oil, eggs, dissolved espresso powder and vanilla extract in a large bowl.
5. Stir in the flour mixture until blended.
6. Spoon batter evenly into prepared muffin cups, filling each cup about halfway full.
7. Bake in 350°F oven for 17-20 minutes or until tops spring back when lightly touched.
8. Cool cupcakes in pan for 3 minutes. Turn out onto wire rack to cool completely.
9. Just before serving, frost each cupcake with a tablespoonful of whipped topping.
10. Dust with cocoa powder through fine-mesh sieve.
